# Carbidopa 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Carbidopa 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Carbidopa</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 9 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Carbidopa 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Stalevo is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with Parkinson's disease and end-of-dose motor fluctuations not stabilised on levodopa / dopa-decarboxylase (DDC)-inhibitor treatment.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（9 個）：<ul>
<li>Rasmussen subacute encephalitis | 98.43% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>PLA2G6-associated neurodegeneration (PLAN) | 97.60% | L4 | Research Question（99.0%）</li>
<li>Transaldolase deficiency | 97.40% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>Myelitis | 97.40% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>Fructose-1,6-bisphosphatase deficiency | 97.09% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>Paralysis agitans, juvenile, of Hunt | 95.60% | L5 | Research Question（99.0%）</li>
<li>PSP-corticobasal syndrome | 95.36% | L4 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>X-linked intellectual disability-ataxia-apraxia (MCT8 deficiency) | 94.87% | L4 | Research Question（99.0%）</li>
<li>X-linked intellectual disability-cerebellar hypoplasia | 93.72% | L4 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/carbidopa/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
